title: Targeting proline in (phospho)proteomics.
author: van der Laarse SAM van Gelder CAGH Bern M Akeroyd M Olsthoorn MMA Heck AJR
content: S-EPMC7496877 PMC7496877 Targeting proline in (phospho)proteomics. Mass spectrometry-based proteomics experiments typically start with the digestion of proteins using trypsin, chosen because of its high specificity, availability, and ease of use.
